reference: Hello Doctor. Last month, I had an abortion. This month, I got my period, which lasted for six days. After the period ended, I felt a little pain in my right abdomen and I am experiencing some watery discharge, which started three to four days after my period ended. Is something wrong with that?
text: Hello doctor, last month I had an abortion. This month I got my period which lasted for six days. After the period ended, I felt a little pain in my right abdomen and I am experiencing some watery discharge which started three to four days after my period ended. Is something wrong with that?
